flow_points: Here is the chronological match flow:
United States of America posted a strong Powerplay performance, scoring 65 runs for 0 wickets.
Their run rate in the Powerplay was an impressive 10.83.
SP Krishnamurthi anchored USA's innings, contributing 34.2% of the team's total runs.
A crucial bowling spell was delivered by WP Myburgh, taking 2 wickets for 24 runs in 4 overs (impact 89.72).
Defensive pressure was also sustained by SC van Schalkwyk, marked by an impact score of 83.77.
Despite these efforts, United States of America concluded their innings with a high-scoring finish in the Death Overs.
This Death Overs surge saw a run rate of 12.6, significantly shifting the match momentum.
In their chase, Namibia achieved 57 runs for 1 wicket in their Powerplay.
Ultimately, United States of America won the match by 31 runs.
